text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. It focuses on text understanding, allowing machines to read, interpret, and make sense of written words. For example, NLP powers translation tools that convert sentences between languages, making communication easier across the world. It also performs sentiment analysis by analyzing text to detect emotions like happiness or anger. This is useful for businesses wanting to know how customers feel. Additionally, chatbots use NLP to hold conversations, answer questions, and provide support. Thanks to these advances, computers are becoming better at communicating naturally with us.
